title: Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Himachal Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary, Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in Kinnaur district, Himachal Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in Kinnaur district, Himachal Pradesh, India. It was established in 1982 and covers an area of about 503 km2 in the upper catchment of the Bhaba Valley. The sanctuary is situated between elevations of 1,200 to 1600 metres and forms a significant part of the western Himalayas. The vegetation ranges from temperate coniferous forests to alpine meadows.

topPlaces.name: Bhaba Pass
topPlaces.description: Bhaba Pass, also known as Bhawa Pass, is a high mountain pass (elevation 4,890 metres (16,040 ft)) situated in the northern Indian state of Himachal Pradesh in the Indian Himalayas. It is located on the border of Kinnaur district and Lahaul and Spiti District, and borders Pin Valley National Park and the Rupi-Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary.

items.note: Bhaba Pass, also known as Bhawa Pass, is a high mountain pass (elevation 4,890 metres (16,040 ft)) situated in the northern Indian state of Himachal Pradesh in the Indian Himalayas. It is located on the border of Kinnaur district and Lahaul and Spiti District, and borders Pin Valley National Park and the Rupi-Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kullu-Manali Airport (Bhuntar) (77 km) and the nearest railway station is Dehradun Railway Station (156 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rupi Bhaba Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhaba Pass.
